name: huntress-mcp
description: Every Huntress endpoint, plus fleet-wide incident, coverage, and billing rollups the API can't.

huntress_api_key.title: HUNTRESS_API_KEY
huntress_api_key.description: Sets HUNTRESS_API_KEY for the Huntress MCP server. Get a credential from https://www.huntress.com/terms-of-service.

huntress_api_secret.title: HUNTRESS_API_SECRET
huntress_api_secret.description: Sets HUNTRESS_API_SECRET for the Huntress MCP server. Get a credential from https://www.huntress.com/terms-of-service.
